01.0101: Live horses, asses, mules and hinnies
01.0105: Live poultry, that is to say, fowls of the species Gallus domesticus, ducks, geese, turkeys and guinea fowls

02.0201: Meat of bovine animals, fresh or chilled
02.0203: Meat of swine, fresh, chilled or frozen
02.0204: Meat of sheep or goats, fresh, chilled or frozen
02.0205: Meat of horses, asses, mules or hinnies, fresh, chilled or frozen
02.0206: Edible offal of bovine animals, swine, sheep, goats, horses, asses, mules or hinnies, fresh, chilled or frozen
02.0207: Meat and edible offal, of the poultry of heading 0105, fresh, chilled or frozen
02.0208: Other meat and edible meat offal, fresh, chilled or frozen
02.0209: Pig fat, free of lean meat, and poultry fat, not rendered or otherwise extracted, fresh, chilled, frozen, salted, in brine, dried or smoked
02.0210: Meat and edible meat offal, salted, in brine, dried or smoked; edible flours and meals of meat or meat offal

03.0302: Fish, fresh or chilled, excluding fish fillets and other fish meat of heading 0304
03.0303: Fish, frozen, excluding fish fillets and other fish meat of heading 0304
03.0304: Fish fillets and other fish meat (whether or not minced), fresh, chilled or frozen
03.0305: Fish, dried, salted or in brine; smoked fish, whether or not cooked before or during the smoking process; flours, meals and pellets of fish, fit for human consumption
03.0306: Crustaceans, whether in shell or not, live, fresh, chilled, frozen, dried, salted or in brine; smoked crustaceans, whether in shell or not, whether or not cooked before or during the smoking process; flours, meals and pellets of crustaceans, fit for human consumption
03.0307: Molluscs, whether in shell or not, live, fresh, chilled, frozen, dried, salted or in brine; smoked molluscs, whether in shell or not, whether or not cooked before or during the smoking process; flours, meals and pellets of molluscs, fit for human consumption
03.0308: Aquatic invertebrates other than crustaceans and molluscs, live, fresh, chilled, frozen, dried, salted or in brine; smoked aquatic invertebrates, whether or not cooked before or during the smoking process; flours, meals and pellets of aquatic invertebrates other than crustaceans and molluscs, fit for human consumption
03.0309: Flours, meals and pellets of fish, crustaceans, molluscs or other aquatic invertebrates, unfit for human consumption

04.0401: Milk and cream, not concentrated nor containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
04.0402: Milk and cream, concentrated or containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
04.0403: Buttermilk, curdled milk and cream, yogurt, kephir and other fermented or acidified milk and cream, whether or not concentrated or containing added sugar or other sweetening matter or flavoured or containing added fruit, nuts or cocoa
04.0404: Whey, whether or not concentrated or containing added sugar or other sweetening matter; products consisting of natural milk constituents, whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter, not elsewhere specified or included
04.0405: Butter and other fats and oils derived from milk; dairy spreads
04.0407: Birds' eggs, in shell, fresh, preserved or cooked
04.0408: Birds' eggs, not in shell, and egg yolks, fresh, dried, cooked by steaming or by boiling in water, moulded, frozen or otherwise preserved, whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
04.0410: Edible products of animal origin, not elsewhere specified or included

05.0501: Human hair, unworked, whether or not washed or scoured; waste of human hair
05.0502: Pigs', hogs' or boars' bristles and hair; badger hair and other brush making hair; waste of such bristles or hair
05.0504: Guts, bladders and stomachs of animals (other than fish), whole and pieces thereof, fresh, chilled, frozen, salted, in brine, dried or smoked
05.0505: Skins and other parts of birds, with their feathers or down, feathers and parts of feathers (whether or not with trimmed edges) and down, not further worked than cleaned, disinfected or treated for preservation; powder and waste of feathers or parts of feathers
05.0506: Bones and horn-cores, unworked, defatted, simply prepared (but not cut to shape), treated with acid or degelatinised; powder and waste of these products
05.0507: Ivory, tortoise-shell, whalebone and whalebone hair, horns, antlers, hooves, nails, claws and beaks, unworked or simply prepared but not cut to shape; powder and waste of these products
05.0508: Coral and similar materials, unworked or simply prepared but not further worked; shells of molluscs, crustaceans or echinoderms and cuttle-bone, unworked or simply prepared but not cut to shape, powder and waste thereof
05.0510: Ambergris, castoreum, civet and musk; cantharides; bile, whether or not dried; glands and other animal products used in the preparation of pharmaceutical products, fresh, chilled, frozen or otherwise provisionally preserved
05.0511: Animal products not elsewhere specified or included; dead animals of Chapter 1 or 3, unfit for human consumption

06.0601: Bulbs, tubers, tuberous roots, corms, crowns and rhizomes, dormant, in growth or in flower; chicory plants and roots other than roots of heading 1212
06.0602: Other live plants (including their roots), cuttings and slips; mushroom spawn
06.0603: Cut flowers and flower buds of a kind suitable for bouquets or for ornamental purposes, fresh, dried, dyed, bleached, impregnated or otherwise prepared
06.0604: Foliage, leaves and twigs, and other parts of plants, without flowers or flower buds, and grasses, mosses and lichens, being goods of a kind suitable for bouquets or for ornamental purposes, fresh, dried, dyed, bleached, impregnated or otherwise prepared

07.0703: Onions, shallots, garlic, leeks and other alliaceous vegetables, fresh or chilled
07.0704: Cabbages, cauliflowers, kohlrabi, kale and similar edible brassicas, fresh or chilled
07.0705: Lettuce (Lactuca sativa) and chicory (Cichorium spp.), fresh or chilled
07.0706: Carrots, turnips, salad beetroot, salsify, celeriac, radishes and similar edible roots, fresh or chilled
07.0707: Cucumbers and gherkins, fresh or chilled
07.0708: Leguminous vegetables, shelled or unshelled, fresh or chilled
07.0710: Vegetables (uncooked or cooked by steaming or boiling in water), frozen
07.0711: Vegetables provisionally preserved (for example, by sulphur dioxide gas, in brine, in sulphur water or in other preservative solutions), but unsuitable in that state for immediate consumption
07.0712: Dried vegetables, whole, cut, sliced, broken or in powder, but not further prepared
07.0713: Dried leguminous vegetables, shelled, whether or not skinned or split
07.0714: Manioc, arrowroot, salep, Jerusalem artichokes, sweet potatoes and similar roots and tubers with high starch or inulin content, fresh, chilled, frozen or dried, whether or not sliced or in the form of pellets; sago pith

08.0801: Coconuts, Brazil nuts and cashew nuts, fresh or dried, whether or not shelled or peeled
08.0802: Other nuts, fresh or dried, whether or not shelled or peeled
08.0803: Bananas, including plantains, fresh or dried
08.0804: Dates, figs, pineapples, avocados, guavas, mangoes and mangosteens, fresh or dried
08.0809: Apricots, cherries, peaches (including nectarines), plums and sloes, fresh
08.0811: Fruit and nuts, uncooked or cooked by steaming or boiling in water, frozen, whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
08.0812: Fruit and nuts, provisionally preserved (for example, by sulphur dioxide gas, in brine, in sulphur water or in other preservative solutions), but unsuitable in that state for immediate consumption
08.0813: Fruit, dried, other than that of headings 0801 to 0806; mixtures of nuts or dried fruits of this Chapter
08.0814: Peel of citrus fruit or melons (including watermelons), fresh, frozen, dried or provisionally preserved in brine, in sulphur water or in other preservative solutions

09.0901: Coffee, whether or not roasted or decaffeinated; coffee husks and skins; coffee substitutes containing coffee in any proportion
09.0904: Pepper of the genus Piper; dried or crushed or ground fruits of the genus Capsicum or of the genus Pimenta
09.0909: Seeds of anise, badian, fennel, coriander, cumin or caraway; juniper berries
09.0910: Ginger, saffron, turmeric (curcuma), thyme, bay leaves, curry and other spices

10.1008: Buckwheat, millet and canary seed; other cereals

11.1102: Cereal flours other than of wheat or meslin
11.1104: Cereal grains otherwise worked (for example, hulled, rolled, flaked, pearled, sliced or kibbled), except rice of heading 1006; germ of cereals, whole, rolled, flaked or ground
11.1105: Flour, meal, powder, flakes, granules and pellets of potatoes
11.1106: Flour, meal and powder of the dried leguminous vegetables of heading 0713, of sago or of roots or tubers of heading 0714, or of the products of Chapter 8
11.1109: Wheat gluten, whether or not dried

12.1201: Soya beans, whether or not broken
12.1202: Ground-nuts, not roasted or otherwise cooked, whether or not shelled or broken
12.1205: Rape or colza seeds, whether or not broken
12.1206: Sunflower seeds, whether or not broken
12.1207: Other oil seeds and oleaginous fruits, whether or not broken
12.1208: Flours and meals of oil seeds or oleaginous fruits, other than those of mustard
12.1209: Seeds, fruit and spores, of a kind used for sowing
12.1210: Hop cones, fresh or dried, whether or not ground, powdered or in the form of pellets; lupulin
12.1211: Plants and parts of plants (including seeds and fruits), of a kind used primarily in perfumery, in pharmacy or for insecticidal, fungicidal or similar purposes, fresh, chilled, frozen or dried, whether or not cut, crushed or powdered
12.1212: Locust beans, seaweeds and other algae, sugar beet and sugar cane, fresh, chilled, frozen or dried, whether or not ground; fruit stones and kernels and other vegetable products (including unroasted chicory roots of the variety Cichorium intybus sativum) of a kind used primarily for human consumption, not elsewhere specified or included
12.1213: Cereal straw and husks, unprepared, whether or not chopped, ground, pressed or in the form of pellets
12.1214: Swedes, mangolds, fodder roots, hay, lucerne (alfalfa), clover, sainfoin, forage kale, lupines, vetches and similar forage products, whether or not in the form of pellets

13.1301: Lac; natural gums, resins, gum-resins and oleoresins (for example, balsams)
13.1302: Vegetable saps and extracts; pectic substances, pectinates and pectates; agar-agar and other mucilages and thickeners, whether or not modified, derived from vegetable products

14.1401: Vegetable materials of a kind used primarily for plaiting (for example, bamboos, rattans, reeds, rushes, osier, raffia, cleaned, bleached or dyed cereal straw, and lime bark)
14.1404: Vegetable products not elsewhere specified or included

15.1501: Pig fat (including lard) and poultry fat, other than that of heading 0209 or 1503
15.1502: Fats of bovine animals, sheep or goats, other than those of heading 1503
15.1503: Lard stearin, lard oil, oleostearin, oleo-oil and tallow oil, not emulsified or mixed or otherwise prepared
15.1504: Fats and oils and their fractions, of fish or marine mammals, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1505: Wool grease and fatty substances derived therefrom (including lanolin)
15.1506: Other animal fats and oils and their fractions, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1507: Soya-bean oil and its fractions, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1508: Ground-nut oil and its fractions, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1509: Olive oil and its fractions, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1510: Other oils and their fractions, obtained solely from olives, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified, including blends of these oils or fractions with oils or fractions of heading 1509
15.1511: Palm oil and its fractions, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1512: Sunflower-seed, safflower or cotton-seed oil and fractions thereof, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1513: Coconut (copra), palm kernel or babassu oil and fractions thereof, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1514: Rape, colza or mustard oil and fractions thereof, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1515: Other fixed vegetable fats and oils (including jojoba oil) and their fractions, whether or not refined, but not chemically modified
15.1516: Animal or vegetable fats and oils and their fractions, partly or wholly hydrogenated, inter-esterified, re-esterified or elaidinised, whether or not refined, but not further prepared
15.1517: Margarine; edible mixtures or preparations of animal or vegetable fats or oils or of fractions of different fats or oils of this Chapter, other than edible fats or oils or their fractions of heading 1516
15.1518: Animal or vegetable fats and oils and their fractions, boiled, oxidised, dehydrated, sulphurised, blown, polymerised by heat in vacuum or in inert gas or otherwise chemically modified, excluding those of heading 1516; inedible mixtures or preparations of animal or vegetable fats or oils or of fractions of different fats or oils of this Chapter, not elsewhere specified or included
15.1520: Glycerol, crude; glycerol waters and glycerol lyes
15.1521: Vegetable waxes (other than triglycerides), beeswax, other insect waxes and spermaceti, whether or not refined or coloured
15.1522: Degras; residues resulting from the treatment of fatty substances or animal or vegetable waxes

16.1601: Sausages and similar products, of meat, meat offal or blood; food preparations based on these products
16.1602: Other prepared or preserved meat, meat offal or blood
16.1603: Extracts and juices of meat, fish or crustaceans, molluscs or other aquatic invertebrates
16.1604: Prepared or preserved fish; caviar and caviar substitutes prepared from fish eggs
16.1605: Crustaceans, molluscs and other aquatic invertebrates, prepared or preserved

17.1701: Cane or beet sugar and chemically pure sucrose, in solid form
17.1702: Other sugars, including chemically pure lactose, maltose, glucose and fructose, in solid form; sugar syrups not containing added flavouring or colouring matter; artificial honey, whether or not mixed with natural honey; caramel
17.1703: Molasses resulting from the extraction or refining of sugar
17.1704: Sugar confectionery (including white chocolate), not containing cocoa

18.1801: Cocoa beans, whole or broken, raw or roasted
18.1802: Cocoa shells, husks, skins and other cocoa waste
18.1803: Cocoa paste, whether or not defatted
18.1805: Cocoa powder, not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
18.1806: Chocolate and other food preparations containing cocoa

19.1901: Malt extract; food preparations of flour, groats, meal, starch or malt extract, not containing cocoa or containing less than 40% by weight of cocoa calculated on a totally defatted basis, not elsewhere specified or included; food preparations of goods of headings 0401 to 0404, not containing cocoa or containing less than 5% by weight of cocoa calculated on a totally defatted basis, not elsewhere specified or included
19.1902: Pasta, whether or not cooked or stuffed (with meat or other substances) or otherwise prepared, such as spaghetti, macaroni, noodles, lasagne, gnocchi, ravioli, cannelloni; couscous, whether or not prepared
19.1903: Tapioca and substitutes therefor prepared from starch, in the form of flakes, grains, pearls, siftings or similar forms
19.1904: Prepared foods obtained by the swelling or roasting of cereals or cereal products (for example, corn flakes); cereals (other than maize (corn)) in grain form or in the form of flakes or other worked grains (except flour, groats and meal), pre-cooked or otherwise prepared, not elsewhere specified or included
19.1905: Bread, pastry, cakes, biscuits and other bakers' wares, whether or not containing cocoa; communion wafers, empty cachets of a kind suitable for pharmaceutical use, sealing wafers, rice paper and similar products

20.2001: Vegetables, fruit, nuts and other edible parts of plants, prepared or preserved by vinegar or acetic acid
20.2002: Tomatoes prepared or preserved otherwise than by vinegar or acetic acid
20.2003: Mushrooms and truffles, prepared or preserved otherwise than by vinegar or acetic acid
20.2004: Other vegetables prepared or preserved otherwise than by vinegar or acetic acid, frozen, other than products of heading 2006
20.2005: Other vegetables prepared or preserved otherwise than by vinegar or acetic acid, not frozen, other than products of heading 2006
20.2006: Vegetables, fruit, nuts, fruit-peel and other parts of plants, preserved by sugar (drained, glacé or crystallised)
20.2007: Jams, fruit jellies, marmalades, fruit or nut purée and fruit or nut pastes, obtained by cooking, whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
20.2008: Fruit, nuts and other edible parts of plants, otherwise prepared or preserved, whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter or spirit, not elsewhere specified or included
20.2009: Fruit juices (including grape must) and vegetable juices, unfermented and not containing added spirit, whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
